quicksight.refreshschedule.refreshschedu: A summary of a configured refresh schedule for a dataset.

quicksight.refreshschedule.refreshschedu.Description: The type of refresh that a dataset undergoes. Valid values are as follows:  + `FULL_REFRESH`: A complete refresh of a dataset.+ `INCREMENTAL_REFRESH`: A partial refresh of some rows of a dataset, based on the time window specified.For more information on full and incremental refreshes, see [Refreshing SPICE data](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/refreshing-imported-data.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.
The frequency for the refresh schedule.
An identifier for the refresh schedule.
Time after which the refresh schedule can be started, expressed in `YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS` format.
